news.title:
Chennai Petroleum Corp to hold a board meeting on 26th Mar 2026 to consider interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window for CPCL securities closed from 21st Mar 2026 till 48 hours post board meeting.
news.summary:
Chennai Petroleum Corp to hold a board meeting on 26th Mar 2026 to consider interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window for CPCL securities closed from 21st Mar 2026 till 48 hours post board meeting.

news.title:
Chennai Petroleum Corp's credit rating by CRISIL remains unchanged at AAA Stable.
Key facilities rated include cash credit, fund-based facilities, and commercial papers.
news.summary:
Chennai Petroleum Corp's credit rating by CRISIL remains unchanged at AAA Stable.
Key facilities rated include cash credit, fund-based facilities, and commercial papers.

news.title:
Chennai Petroleum surged 8.6% intraday on 16 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 985.
The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices.
news.summary:
Chennai Petroleum surged 8.6% intraday on 16 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 985.
The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices.

news.title:
OMCs consider freezing refinery transfer price to limit losses, impacting standalone refiners like MRPL, CPCL, and HMEL.
Private refiners like Reliance and Nayara may face margin squeeze; retail fuel prices have remained unchanged since April 2022.
news.summary:
OMCs consider freezing refinery transfer price to limit losses, impacting standalone refiners like MRPL, CPCL, and HMEL.
Private refiners like Reliance and Nayara may face margin squeeze; retail fuel prices have remained unchanged since April 2022.

news.title:
Iran-Israel conflict spikes crude prices, now at 7-month highs, up 20%, but volatility may ease post uncertainty.
Energy stocks like Reliance and Chennai Petroleum may benefit short-term; oil-linked sectors like paints face pressure.
news.summary:
Iran-Israel conflict spikes crude prices, now at 7-month highs, up 20%, but volatility may ease post uncertainty.
Energy stocks like Reliance and Chennai Petroleum may benefit short-term; oil-linked sectors like paints face pressure.

news.title:
Oil PSUs utilized 81% of FY26 capex by January, per oil ministry data.
Firms focus on boosting domestic production and refining capacities aggressively.
news.summary:
Oil PSUs utilized 81% of FY26 capex by January, per oil ministry data.
Firms focus on boosting domestic production and refining capacities aggressively.

news.title:
Russian oil discounts to China hit record levels to boost demand.
Sellers aim to offset potential loss of Indian sales, traders stated.
news.summary:
Russian oil discounts to China hit record levels to boost demand.
Sellers aim to offset potential loss of Indian sales, traders stated.

news.title:
OMC shares rise as Brent falls 4% to $66 and WTI below $63 on easing US-Iran tensions.
Mangalore Refinery jumps 5%; Chennai Petroleum, HPCL gain 2% amid stable OPEC production plans.
news.summary:
OMC shares rise as Brent falls 4% to $66 and WTI below $63 on easing US-Iran tensions.
Mangalore Refinery jumps 5%; Chennai Petroleum, HPCL gain 2% amid stable OPEC production plans.

news.title:
Chennai Petroleum surged 4.9% post Q3 results, with net profit up 4719.5% YoY to Rs. 1001.5 Cr and revenue rising 21% YoY to Rs. 15,683 Cr.
CPCL's low debt-to-equity ratio of 0.22, 3-year average ROE of 31.1, and P/E of 5.99 indicate strong fundamentals and potential undervaluation.
news.summary:
Chennai Petroleum surged 4.9% post Q3 results, with net profit up 4719.5% YoY to Rs. 1001.5 Cr and revenue rising 21% YoY to Rs. 15,683 Cr.
CPCL's low debt-to-equity ratio of 0.22, 3-year average ROE of 31.1, and P/E of 5.99 indicate strong fundamentals and potential undervaluation.

news.title:
428 companies report Dec-2025 results; mid, small caps show strong earnings momentum.
Chennai Petroleum Corp Ltd stands out with exceptional growth in key financial metrics.
news.summary:
428 companies report Dec-2025 results; mid, small caps show strong earnings momentum.
Chennai Petroleum Corp Ltd stands out with exceptional growth in key financial metrics.

news.title:
Chennai Petroleum's Q3 FY26 crude throughput rose to 2.79 MMT, with 105% capacity utilization.
Revenue surged to ₹19,438 crore vs ₹15,683 crore, and PAT hit ₹987 crore vs ₹10 crore YoY.
news.summary:
Chennai Petroleum's Q3 FY26 crude throughput rose to 2.79 MMT, with 105% capacity utilization.
Revenue surged to ₹19,438 crore vs ₹15,683 crore, and PAT hit ₹987 crore vs ₹10 crore YoY.

news.title:
US 25% tariff on Iran may not impact CPCL operations or finances.
It could affect NIOC's dividend claims of over ₹100 crore from CPCL.
news.summary:
US 25% tariff on Iran may not impact CPCL operations or finances.
It could affect NIOC's dividend claims of over ₹100 crore from CPCL.

news.title:
Chennai Petroleum's board meeting on 24th Jan 2026 will review Q3 audited results.
Trading window remains closed till 26th Jan 2026 as per insider trading code.
news.summary:
Chennai Petroleum's board meeting on 24th Jan 2026 will review Q3 audited results.
Trading window remains closed till 26th Jan 2026 as per insider trading code.

news.title:
Chennai Petroleum plans to raise Manali refinery capacity from 210,000 BPD to 280,000 BPD.
A 90,000 BPD crude unit and secondary units will shut for maintenance in Oct-Dec 2026.
news.summary:
Chennai Petroleum plans to raise Manali refinery capacity from 210,000 BPD to 280,000 BPD.
A 90,000 BPD crude unit and secondary units will shut for maintenance in Oct-Dec 2026.

news.title:
Chennai Petroleum Corp faced fines of Rs. 5.4L each from NSE and BSE for non-compliance with SEBI LODR Regulation 17(1).
The company cited Govt. control over director appointments and requested waiver, referencing past favorable outcomes.
news.summary:
Chennai Petroleum Corp faced fines of Rs. 5.4L each from NSE and BSE for non-compliance with SEBI LODR Regulation 17(1).
The company cited Govt. control over director appointments and requested waiver, referencing past favorable outcomes.

news.title: Chennai Petro and MRPL stocks slump amid uncertainty over gross refining margins.
news.summary: Chennai Petro and MRPL stocks slump amid uncertainty over gross refining margins.

news.title:
HCL Tech rose 1.3% to Rs 1,621.55 after expanding collaboration with SAP.
The partnership aims to enhance physical AI solutions for industrial operations.
news.summary:
HCL Tech rose 1.3% to Rs 1,621.55 after expanding collaboration with SAP.
The partnership aims to enhance physical AI solutions for industrial operations.

news.title:
Top MFs increased cash holdings by ₹5,200 cr in October; SBI MF added Tata Motors demerged entity, Adani Power, and Bajaj Finance.
HDFC MF boosted positions in SKF India, Tata Motors entity, trimmed Maruti Suzuki; ICICI Prudential MF exited Chennai Petro, TD Power.
news.summary:
Top MFs increased cash holdings by ₹5,200 cr in October; SBI MF added Tata Motors demerged entity, Adani Power, and Bajaj Finance.
HDFC MF boosted positions in SKF India, Tata Motors entity, trimmed Maruti Suzuki; ICICI Prudential MF exited Chennai Petro, TD Power.

news.title:
Chennai Petroleum Corp Ltd's credit ratings reaffirmed by Crisil with AAA Stable for bank facilities and A1 for commercial papers.
Credit ratings include NCD withdrawal post full redemption; details hosted on cpcl.co.in for investor reference.
news.summary:
Chennai Petroleum Corp Ltd's credit ratings reaffirmed by Crisil with AAA Stable for bank facilities and A1 for commercial papers.
Credit ratings include NCD withdrawal post full redemption; details hosted on cpcl.co.in for investor reference.

news.title:
CPCL plans to launch fuel retail outlets nationwide, targeting 300 by year-end.
Retail entry aims to improve visibility and mitigate price volatility, says MD Sankar.
news.summary:
CPCL plans to launch fuel retail outlets nationwide, targeting 300 by year-end.
